pageContext.name: Super Saiyan Broly Full Power
pageContext.description: The world first met him in Dragon Ball Z: Broly – The Legendary Super Saiyan, then followed his reign of terror through Dragon Ball Z: Broly – Second Coming and Dragon Ball Z: Bio-Broly! Now the enemy of Goku and friends joins the S.H.Figuarts lineup! It's an all-new Broly, standing at a huge 8.6in tall. This is one super-sized anime figure fans won't want to miss.
